title: Clever API v3.1 Data Schema
heading: Clever API v3.1 Data Schema
content:
/\*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com \*/ @layer theme, base, components, utilities; @layer utilities;

[Use this page to review the full Clever API v3.1 schema, including the added student demographic fields.](#)

API v3.1 adds these student demographic updates:

-   `roles.student.gifted_status`
-   `roles.student.section_504_status`
-   `roles.student.disability.disability_status`
-   `roles.student.disability.disability_type`
-   `roles.student.disability.disability_code`
-   `roles.student.home_language_code`
-   `roles.student.frl_status` now also supports `"Other"`
